LanguageData.FoodPreference_CharacterTagTip: {0} likes eating this kind of food: {1}
LanguageData.FoodPreference_CharacterTagTip_Meat: {0} prefers meals made entirely from meat, with no vegetables, grains, dairy, or other non-meat ingredients.
LanguageData.FoodPreference_CharacterTagTip_VeganMeal: {0} prefers meals without any meat, eggs, dairy, or other animal products — typically made from vegetables, fruits, grains, legumes, and other plant-based ingredients.
LanguageData.FoodPreference_CharacterTagTip_Baked: {0} prefers baked foods such as bread, cakes, and pastries.
LanguageData.FoodPreference_CharacterTagTip_Sweets: {0} prefers sweets, desserts, candy, and snacks.
LanguageData.FoodPreference_CharacterTagTip_Canned: {0} prefers processed foods such as canned meals and survival meals.
LanguageData.FoodPreference_CharacterTagTip_Seafood: {0} prefers seafood and dishes made with seafood.
LanguageData.FoodPreference_CharacterTagTip_Dairy: {0} prefers eggs, milk, and dairy products.
LanguageData.FoodPreference_CharacterTagTip_SoyProduc: {0} prefers soybeans, tofu, and other soy products.
LanguageData.FoodPreference_CharacterTagTip_DarkCuisi: {0} prefers dark cuisine such as nutrient paste, insect meat, insect jelly, and twisted meat.
LanguageData.FoodPreference_InfoPrimaryCategoryDesc: The primary food preference category assigned by Personal Food Preferences.
LanguageData.FoodPreference_InfoTagsDesc: All food preference tags detected for this food or its actual ingredients.
LanguageData.FoodPreference_UnclassifiedCount: {0} HumanEdible foods currently resolve only to GenericFood.
LanguageData.FoodPreference_CategoryNoFoods: No loaded foods currently match this category.
LanguageData.FoodPreference_CategoryTextOnly: This preference is determined by the actual ingredients of a meal, so fixed food rows are not shown.
LanguageData.FoodPreference_SettingsMildRecoveryThres: Non-preferred meals to recover from mild picky eating
LanguageData.FoodPreference_SettingsSeverePickyEating: Non-preferred meals to reduce severe picky eating
LanguageData.FoodPreference_SettingsMildPickyEatingMo: Non-preferred food mood while mildly picky
LanguageData.FoodPreference_SettingsSeverePickyEating: Non-preferred food mood while severely picky
LanguageData.FoodPreference_SettingsPermanentPickyEat: Non-preferred food mood while permanently picky
LanguageData.FoodPreference_PreferenceDeprivationNoPr: No preferred food eaten since onset.
